title: artemisia lagocephala
intro: Artemisia lagocephala, also known as 'Taiwan wormwood', is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Artemisia lagocephala include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
